code: import React from'react';import{useAdmin}from'../context/AdminContext';import{PIZZAS}from'../data/menuData';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Inventory(){const{inventory,toggleStock}=useAdmin();return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{className:"section-title",children:["Inventory ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Management"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"section-desc",children:"Toggle pizzas out of stock.
